title: Zapier or make.com not displaying Column Names
excerpt: Why can’t I see the actual column names when using zapier or make.com ? It only shows the monday.com internal column names. It also doesn’t really show the values behind it. Yes I switched to developer mode but it still …

posts.author: PackraftingNZ (Arno Marten)
posts.cookedHtml: Why can’t I see the actual column names when using zapier or make.com ? It only shows the monday.com internal column names. It also doesn’t really show the values behind it. Yes I switched to developer mode but it still isn’t the best to work with. Anyone found a solution for this ?
